title: AI Knowledge Production
public_claim: AI Knowledge Production is presented as an AI assurance and retrieval-integrity instrument.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from threat model to test condition, system behavior, error mode, human-review checkpoint, scoring rule, and release or rejection gate. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
